zh.Bedford, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeline de Beauchamp於大約1076年出生在英國越可爾吉可哈姆時，她的父親Hugh de Beauchamp38歲，母親Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois23歲。她和Walter Espec至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1124年在英國越可爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.Bedford, Bedfordshire, England: 英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeline de Beauchamp于大约1076年出生在英国越可爾吉可哈姆时，她的父亲Hugh de Beauchamp38岁，母亲Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois23岁。她和Walter Espec至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1124年在英国越可爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Adeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adeline de Beauchamp was born about 1076, in Kirkham, Yorkshire, England, her father, Hugh de Beauchamp, was 38 and her mother, Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois, was 23. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Walter Espec. She died about 1124, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeline de Beauchamp est née environ 1076, à Kirkham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Beauchamp, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Walter Espec. Elle est décédée environ 1124, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeline de Beauchamp um 1076 in Kirkham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Beauchamp 38 und ihre Mutter Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois 23. Sie hatte mit Walter Espec mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1124 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline de Beauchamp è nata il circa 1076 nel Kirkham, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Beauchamp, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Walter Espec. Morì circa 1124, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeline de Beauchampが約1076年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルクハムで生まれた時，父Hugh de Beauchampは38歳，母Adeliza Matilda de Tailleboisは23歳であった。彼女はWalter Especとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1124年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeline de Beauchamp(이)가 대략 1076년 영국 요르크실르 커카에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Beauchamp(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Walter Espec(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1124년 영국 요르크실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline de Beauchamp nasceu aproximadamente 1076, em Kirkham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Beauchamp, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Walter Espec. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1124, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeline de Beauchamp родилась около 1076 г. в местности кирхам, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Beauchamp было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois, 23. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Walter Espec. Она умерла около 1124 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeline de Beauchamp nació aproximadamente 1076, en Kirkham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Beauchamp, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Adeliza Matilda de Taillebois, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Walter Espec. Murió aproximadamente 1124, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
